name: Chicken Fried Steak Jggv29b
recipeIngredient: Nutmeg mixed in with the bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge each steak in flour, then egg wash, and finally coat well with bread crumbs.
2. Heat oil in a skillet and brown the steaks on all sides.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook until done, depending on thickness of the steaks.
4. Serve with mashed potatoes, vegetables, rolls, and white gravy.
My husband prefers white gravy over brown, and I think it's better. If you need the gravy recipe, let me know.
